bee: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Byangsi.
beer: noun. An alcoholic drink fermented from starch material, commonly barley malt; often with hops or some other substance (like gruit) to
bel: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Belarusian.
berm: noun. A narrow ledge or shelf, as along the top or bottom of a slope. (Can we verify this sense?)
beseem: verb. Generally with a qualifying word such as ill or well: to appear, look, or seem (a certain way for someone or something).
eel: noun. Any freshwater fish of the order Anguilliformes, which are elongated and resemble snakes.
elm: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Eleme.
else: adjective. Other; in addition to previously mentioned items.
ember: noun. A piece of coal or wood glowing by heat; a hot coal.
eme: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Emerillon.
ers: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Ersu.
lee: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Lyélé.
leer: verb. To look sideways or obliquely; now especially with sexual desire or malicious intent.
mel: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Central Melanau.
melee: noun. A battle fought at close range, one not involving ranged weapons; hand-to-hand combat; brawling.
mere: adjective. Just, only; no more than, pure and simple, neither more nor better than might be expected.
merle: noun. The Eurasian blackbird, Turdus merula.
ree: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Rejang Kayan.
reel: noun. A shaky or unsteady gait.
resee: verb. To see again or anew.
resemble: verb. To be like or similar to (something); to represent as similar.
see: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Seneca.
seem: verb. To appear; to look outwardly; to be perceived as.
seemer: noun. A person who, or a thing which, seems.
seer: noun. One who foretells the future; a clairvoyant, prophet, soothsayer or diviner.
sel: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Selkup.
seme: noun. Anything which serves for any purpose as a substitute for an object of which it is, in some sense, a representation, sign, or symbol.
ser: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Serrano.
